heading: Establishment by regulations of mode or time of assessment
label: 6202 Establishment by regulations of mode or time of assessment
text: If the mode or time for the assessment of any internal revenue tax (including interest, additional amounts, additions to the tax, and assessable penalties) is not otherwise provided for, the Secretary may establish the same by regulations.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
